allow:
Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Kill running dev server before build to prevent .next corruption

Building while a dev server is running overwrites .next mid-use,
leaving it in an inconsistent state that causes 500 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
